prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南京大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约120名、126名、232名、141名、153名。2023年因选科要求调整（物理+化学双必选）出现位次大幅后 移至232名，2024年迅速回升至141名，2025年小幅后移至153名。近三年位次在141–232之间波动，2025年基准位次约153名；南京大学在海南省综合类招生计划 ：2021年18人，2022–2025年均为22人，2026年大幅缩减至10人，缩招幅度约54.5%。招生名额骤减将显著加剧竞争，预计录取位次明显前移（数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（食堂999元帝王蟹事件、不为全日制专硕提供宿舍等），但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名总榜第17位（高热），短视频曝 光量大，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常记录中未见明显断档信号；南京大学拥有26个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、物理学A+、化学A+、天文学A+ 、大气科学A+、地质学A+、中国语言文学A+、外国语言文学A+、工商管理A+等，学科实力极强，与招生专业高度匹配；南京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第6名（2021–2026年稳定在第5–6名），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气 工程等专业持续高热推荐，人工智能专业谨慎观望但关注度高；海南省考生总数从2025年67408人增至2026年约78000人（增幅约15.7%），竞争进一步加剧；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，对海南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在海南招生占比极小（2024年仅约0.79%），属跨省招生，无 本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅缩减54.5%（从22人降至10人）、海南省考生总数增长约15.7%、学校顶尖层次与高热抖音关注度等因素，预计2026年南京大 学在海南省综合类录取位次将较2025年显著前移。，结合考生规模增加进一步修正，预测最低录取位次约98名，区间86–110名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能
- 计算机科学与技术
- 理科试验班（匡亚明学院大理科班）：涵盖计算机、数学、物理、化学等A+学科
- 计算机科学与技术（计算机金融实验班）（含双学士学位）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（化学与生命科学类）
- 软件工程（智能化软件）
- 技术科学试验班（智能科学与技术、集成电路等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息类
- 理科试验班类（数理科学类）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年南京大学在海南大幅缩招至10人，预计录取位次前移至约98名（区间86–110名）。位次在预测区间内的考生建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次 明显优于区间下限（如85名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（人工智能、计算机科学与技术、匡亚明学院大理科班）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nanjing University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 120, 126, 232, 141, and 153 respectively. In 2023, due to adjustments in subject requirements (mandatory Physics + Chemistry), the ranking significantly dropped to 232, quickly rebounded to 141 in 2024, and slightly moved back to 153 in 2025. Over the past three years, rankings have fluctuated between 141 and 232, with a baseline ranking of about 153 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Nanjing University in Hainan's comprehensive category: 18 students in 2021, 22 students each year from 2022 to 2025, and a sharp reduction to 10 students in 2026, a decrease of approximately 54.5%. The sudden reduction in enrollment slots will significantly intensify competition, and the admission ranking is expected to move forward noticeably (smaller number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to the 999 yuan emperor crab incident in the cafeteria, and the lack of dormitory provision for full-time professional master's students), but the overall impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 17th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; no obvious gap signals in historical admission anomaly records; Nanjing University has 26 A- or above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Astronomy A+, Atmospheric Science A+, Geology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Business Administration A+, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength highly matched with enrollment majors; Nanjing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 6th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (stable at 5th-6th from 2021 to 2026), belonging to the top-tier national universities, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed but has high attention; the total number of candidates in Hainan Province increases from 67,408 in 2025 to approximately 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7%), further intensifying competition; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing City, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to Hainan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hainan is very small (only about 0.79% in 2024), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment with no local bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction of 54.5% in the 2026 enrollment plan (from 22 to 10 students), the approximately 15.7% increase in the total number of Hainan candidates, the university's top-tier level and high Douyin attention, it is expected that the admission ranking for Nanjing University in Hainan's comprehensive category in 2026 will move forward significantly compared to 2025. Further adjusted based on the increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 98, with a range of 86-110.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Computer Science and Technology
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming College Big Science Class): Covers A+ disciplines including Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry
- Computer Science and Technology (Computer Finance Experimental Class) (including dual bachelor's degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences)
- Software Engineering (Intelligent Software)
- Technical Science Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Technology, Integrated Circuits, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Nanjing University significantly reduces enrollment in Hainan to 10 students, with the admission ranking expected to move forward to approximately 98 (range 86-110). Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 85) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology, Kuang Yaming College Big Science Class).
